purpose: Config-as-code registry for AI colleagues that can assist product-layer workflows.

ollama_lan.access_note: Ollama is expected to be reachable from the local LAN. Keep firewall and model access policy under central IT control.

ollama_localhost.access_note: Alternative for host-local product-layer runs where Ollama is bound to localhost:11434. In Docker, localhost means the product-layer container unless the runtime maps this explicitly.

ai_colleagues.name: Ollama Product Analyst
ai_colleagues.role: Supports product-layer analysis, metadata review, DPP drafting, and governance explanations.

body.prompt: Elaborate weather gradient for Stuttgart the next days.
Elaborate weather gradient for Stuttgart the next days.

example_curl: curl http://192.168.178.60:11434/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"gpt-oss:20b","prompt":"Elaborate weather gradient for Stuttgart the next days.","stream":false}'
alternative_example_curl: curl http://localhost:11434/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"gpt-oss:20b","prompt":"Elaborate weather gradient for Stuttgart the next days.","stream":false}'

governance.logging: Log provider, model, task id, timestamp, and reviewer decision; do not log sensitive prompts without approval.
governance.data_policy: Do not send personal, confidential, financial, customer, or protected telemetry data to an AI colleague unless the provider is approved for that classification.
governance.review_policy: AI outputs are suggestions only and require human review before product data, metadata, or certification state changes.
